tactics: Opens combat with shortbow attacks from 60+ feet away, maximizing range advantage while staying out of melee
Uses Nimble Escape to disengage as a bonus action after each attack, maintaining distance and avoiding opportunity attacks—core to goblin hit-and-run strategy
Falls back behind cover, terrain, or allies when forced into melee, relying on AC 15 to weather hits while repositioning for ranged attacks
goblin.flee_threshold: Flees at ~50% HP (4 HP) or immediately if cornered with no escape route — goblins are cowardly opportunists who fight only when they have numerical advantage or a safe retreat path; a wounded goblin alone prioritizes survival over combat honor.
